scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/web-api run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/web-ui run build
scripts.dev: echo 'Use ../../scripts/dev-desktop.sh — raw electron dist/main.js fails in monorepos (npm electron shadows builtin).'
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build:deps && npm run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:extensions:if-needed && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:ffmpeg && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:voice-bundled && node scripts/materialize-pack-deps.mjs && electron-builder --mac && node scripts/bundle-pg-deps.mjs
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:deps && npm run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:extensions:if-needed && TARGET_ARCH=arm64 pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:ffmpeg && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:voice-bundled && TARGET_ARCH=arm64 node scripts/materialize-pack-deps.mjs && electron-builder --mac --arm64 && node scripts/bundle-pg-deps.mjs
scripts.dist:mac:x64: pnpm run build:deps && npm run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:extensions:if-needed && TARGET_ARCH=x64 pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:ffmpeg && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:voice-bundled && TARGET_ARCH=x64 node scripts/materialize-pack-deps.mjs && electron-builder --mac --x64 && node scripts/bundle-pg-deps.mjs
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm run build:deps && npm run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:extensions:if-needed && TARGET_PLATFORM=linux pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:ffmpeg && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:voice-bundled && TARGET_PLATFORM=linux node scripts/materialize-pack-deps.mjs && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build:deps && npm run build && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:extensions:if-needed && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:ffmpeg && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:voice-bundled && node scripts/materialize-pack-deps.mjs && electron-builder --win

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Agent-X uses your microphone for voice commands and speech-to-text.
extendInfo.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Agent-X uses your location for local weather, maps, and recommendations.
